items.title: Ex-wife of Dubai ruler's nephew in custody, prosecutors say
items.dek: Zeynab Javadli had not been in contact with any of her friends since Tuesday.

items.title: Zelensky proposes face-to-face talks in open letter to Putin
items.dek: Ukraine's president tells the Russian leader that only "direct engagement" between the two countries could end the war, with the US focused on Iran.
